classes.reasoning: This is a published journal correspondence article from The Lancet Neurology (Volume 22, Issue 11, November 2023) with a DOI (10.1016/S1474-4422(23)00291-X), author affiliations, and typical academic publication structure including Summary, Results, Discussion, and conflict of interest disclosures.

summary: This is a medical journal correspondence article published in The Lancet Neurology describing a post-hoc analysis of the VELAGOSTAT-002 trial. The publication reports on plasma phosphorylated tau 181 as a pharmacodynamic biomarker for tau aggregation inhibition in Alzheimer's disease patients treated with BRC-209.
